name: Baked Apple Rice Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Pared and cored apples (2 medium), finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the egg substitute, apples, rice, dates, sugar, cinnamon, margarine, and vanilla until combined.
3. Beat the egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the rice mixture using a spatula.
4. Pour the pudding mixture into a 1½ quart casserole or soufflé dish. Sprinkle cinnamon evenly over the top.
5. Place the dish in a larger pan filled with enough hot water to reach about an inch up the sides of the dish. This ensures even baking.
6. Bake for 70 minutes, or until set and lightly browned on top.
7. Serve warm or chilled. Garnish with fresh apple slices dipped in lemon juice if desired.
Nutrient analysis: 1 serving contains 185 Calories, 4g protein, 6g fat, 31g carbohydrates, 42mg sodium, and 0 cholesterol.
